parameters.name: query
parameters.value: travel girl golden hour -is:retweet has:media lang:en min_faves:500

nodes.name: Search X for Trends
nodes.notes: Requires X Bearer Token in HTTP Header Auth credential. If rate limited, the next node uses fallback data.

values.content:
=You are an expert AI image/video prompt engineer creating viral content for an AI influencer.

Influencer: Nova Linh, 24yo Vietnamese-Filipino mix. Cute+sexy, travel-obsessed, editorial but candid.

Today's trending reference:
{{ $json.trending_reference }}

Platform rotation (today pick based on day number {{ new Date().getDate() % 3 }}: 0=Freepik Mystic, 1=Kling AI, 2=Higgsfield).

Generate ONE perfect AI prompt that:
1. Fits Nova perfectly (petite, Southeast Asian features, warm skin)
2. Is highly likely to go viral based on the trend
3. Includes: exact location, outfit, lighting, camera specs
4. Avoids AI tells: no glowing eyes, no generic 'beautiful woman'
5. Ends with platform-appropriate quality enhancers

Return ONLY this JSON (no markdown, no explanation):
{
  "id": "post-{{ Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) }}",
  "date": "{{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}",
  "title": "5-7 word title",
  "platform": "chosen platform",
  "type": "image or video",
  "image": "",
  "prompt": "full detailed prompt",
  "tags": ["tag1", "tag2", "tag3", "tag4"],
  "trending_reference": "1-2 sentence summary",
  "notes": "brief usage tip"
}

nodes.name: Generate Prompt (Claude)
nodes.notes: Requires Anthropic API credential in n8n. Uses claude-sonnet-4-6.

nodes.name: Route by Platform
nodes.notes: True = Freepik (auto-generate). False = Kling/Higgsfield (sends notification for manual generation).

body.negative_prompt: ugly, deformed, extra fingers, distorted, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, artificial look, plastic skin

nodes.name: Generate Image (Freepik)
nodes.notes: Requires Freepik API key as HTTP Header Auth credential. Get key at freepik.com/api

nodes.name: Fetch posts.json from GitHub
nodes.notes: Requires GitHub API credential (Personal Access Token with repo scope)

nodes.name: Push to GitHub
nodes.notes: Netlify detects this push and auto-deploys the website within ~60 seconds.
